nasb.text: “Be strong and courageous, do not fear or be dismayed because of the king of Assyria nor because of all the horde that is with him; for the one with us is greater than the one with him.

esv.text: “Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid or dismayed before the king of Assyria and all the horde that is with him, for there are more with us than with him.

cnv.text: “你們要堅強勇敢，不要因亞述王和他統領的大軍懼怕驚慌；因為和我們同在的，比和他們同在的更多。

ccb.text: “你们要刚强勇敢，不要在亚述王和他的大军面前恐惧惊慌，因为与我们同在的比与他同在的更有能力。
